ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "version" TEXT /* Software version installed on the vehicle */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., operational, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., urban, rural, highway) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "max_speed_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum speed limit in the environment */,
  "traffic_density" REAL /* Traffic density in the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition (e.g., sunny, rainy, snowy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in meters */,
  "precipitation_amount" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_of_day" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time of day */,
  "time_name" TEXT /* Name of the time of day (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time of day */,
  "peak_hours" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the time is a peak hour */,
  "average_traffic_volume" REAL /* Average traffic volume during this time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "navigation_history" (
  "navigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each navigation event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time of day */,
  "route_taken" TEXT /* Route taken by the vehicle */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Distance traveled by the vehicle */,
  "time_elapsed" REAL /* Time elapsed during navigation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the navigation event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the navigation event */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the navigation */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption during the navigation (if applicable) */,
  "battery_level_start" REAL /* Battery level at the start of the navigation */,
  "battery_level_end" REAL /* Battery level at the end of the navigation */,
  "navigation_status" TEXT /* Status of the navigation (e.g., completed, interrupted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("navigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_navigation_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_navigation_history_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES time_of_day ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_navigation_history_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_navigation_history_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward event */,
  "navigation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the navigation event */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "reward_value" REAL /* Value of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_navigation_id FOREIGN KEY ("navigation_id") REFERENCES navigation_history ("navigation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "navigation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the navigation event */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., turn, accelerate, brake) */,
  "action_value" REAL /* Value of the action */,
  "action_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_navigation_id FOREIGN KEY ("navigation_id") REFERENCES navigation_history ("navigation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "navigation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the navigation event */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., GPS, lidar, camera) */,
  "sensor_value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "sensor_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor data was recorded */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_navigation_id FOREIGN KEY ("navigation_id") REFERENCES navigation_history ("navigation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, engineer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed during the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., navigation mode, sensor sensitivity) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified date and time of the setting */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
